topic.what: Privacy-preserving clothing classification using Vision Transformer for thermal comfort estimation in occupant-centric HVAC control
topic.how: Applies ViT model with key-based image encryption (pixel shuffling + block scrambling) to enable classification directly on encrypted images
topic.why_matters: Enables privacy-preserving HVAC control by preventing exposure of occupant images to cloud servers while maintaining high classification accuracy

characteristics.evidence: Table I - ViT-S/16 with ViT-based encryption achieves 95.65% on encrypted vs 93.51% ResNet-18 on plain images
characteristics.context: Four clothing categories from DeepFashion dataset; no accuracy degradation from plain to encrypted images

characteristics.what_it_measures: Difference in accuracy between plain and encrypted image classification
characteristics.evidence: Table I shows identical accuracy (95.65%) for plain and encrypted with ViT-based scheme
characteristics.context: Demonstrates that ViT processes encrypted patches without needing spatial arrangement

characteristics.what_it_measures: Number of trainable parameters in the ViT model
characteristics.evidence: Conclusion section states ViT-S/16 with 22.0M parameters
characteristics.context: Suitable for edge implementation in consumer electronics

characteristics.evidence: Table I - outerwear category shows largest improvement over conventional method
characteristics.context: Most challenging category; ViT-based method significantly outperforms pixel-based (20.92pp improvement)

characteristics.what_it_measures: Number of images in reorganized DeepFashion dataset
characteristics.evidence: Section III-A describes dataset reorganization into 4 clothing insulation categories

requires: shared encryption key K between user and cloud

novelty: First application of Vision Transformer for privacy-preserving clothing classification
No accuracy degradation when classifying encrypted images using ViT self-attention
Key-based image transformation preserving ViT feature extraction on encrypted patches
Practical demonstration for PMV-based thermal comfort estimation in real HVAC systems
open_problems: Generalization to real-world deployment scenarios beyond DeepFashion
Handling diverse clothing styles and seasonal variations
Scalability to more clothing insulation categories
Long-term key management and security guarantees for encryption scheme
